stories.US-042: READY (backlog #1, operator-selected): Bound the PowerShell clipboard read against oversized clipboards so Ctrl+V in the Load dialog stays fast + memory-bounded. Observable: a multi-MB fake clipboard returns quickly, inserts only the bounded first line, memory does NOT scale with clipboard size. Opens R-TUI-044. OPEN for Phase 1: cap approach (PS-only stdout bound vs single post-read truncation in read_os_clipboard covering all 3 layers -- the latter is simpler + also covers tk/ctypes which materialize the whole string; only the first line is ever used).
